script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== ts ==='; date -u +%FT%TZ
echo '=== claude (mskai) recent errors ==='
tail -20 /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null
echo '=== claude (mskai) recent debug.log (last few RC entries) ==='
grep -E 'priv=|^RC:|^STDOUT:' /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null | tail -30
echo '=== credential file: mtime + size + top of token ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G mtime=%y size=%s %n' /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
head -c 120 /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo
echo '=== live claude call as azureuser with full responder-style invocation ==='
runuser -u azureuser -- bash -c 'cd /home/azureuser && echo "Reply with exactly the word: TESTOK" | timeout 90 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --dangerously-skip-permissions --append-system-prompt "You are a test bot. Reply briefly." > /tmp/msk_test 2>/tmp/msk_err; echo "rc=$?"; echo "--stdout--"; head -c 600 /tmp/msk_test; echo; echo "--stderr--"; head -c 600 /tmp/msk_err'
echo '=== mskai service uptime ==='
for svc in mskai-bot mskai-responder; do
  pid=$(systemctl show ${svc}.service -p MainPID --value 2>/dev/null)
  uptime=$(ps -o etimes= -p "$pid" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
  printf '  %-20s pid=%s uptime_s=%s\n' "$svc" "$pid" "$uptime"
done
echo '=== claude-cred-chmod cron alive? ==='
ps -ef | grep -F 'claude-cred-chmod' | grep -v grep | head -3
crontab -u azureuser -l 2>&1 | grep -F claude-cred
echo '===END==='
